title: muilla clevelandii
intro: Muilla clevelandii, also known as Cleveland's muilla or Kauai muilla, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asparagaceae, native to Hawaii. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, with potential benefits for various health conditions. The plant's roots and leaves are said to have medicinal properties, including reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Muilla clevelandii can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
